description: Modified reflection_write_hypothesis to store the full hypothesis content in the session memory using memory_page_out, enabling easier access for subsequent reflection stages and improving reasoning architecture.

hypothesis.rationale: The current reflection_write_hypothesis function only writes a status message to memory, not the actual hypothesis content. By storing the full hypothesis content, subsequent reflection stages can directly access and build upon the previous hypothesis without needing to re-read from a file. This improves the reasoning_architecture by making the hypothesis more readily available and improving the flow of information.
hypothesis.expected_improvement: Improved ability of Boros to leverage past hypotheses for subsequent reflections, leading to more coherent and progressively refined evolutionary paths. This will be reflected in a more consistent and higher quality score for reasoning_architecture as the system's internal thought process becomes more robust.
